label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking for the best title of the passage. The passage is about the London Olympics and how they were considered the "greenest" Games ever. The main points discussed are the environmental efforts made during the event. First, the article mentions that London aimed to host the "greenest" Games by cleaning up polluted areas, using recycled materials for construction, implementing green building techniques, managing waste effectively, promoting public transport to reduce carbon emissions, and having successful anti-doping efforts. Looking at the answer options: (A) How to deal with the anti-doping – While the passage does mention the anti-doping results, that's just a part of the overall environmental efforts. The title should cover the main theme, which is the green initiatives. (B) How to use recycled materials – This is a significant part of the passage, but again, the article covers more than just using recycled materials. There's also waste management, green building techniques, public transport, etc. (C) London's green games – This seems to encapsulate the overall theme. The entire passage discusses various green initiatives taken by London for the Olympics, hence "green games" would be a fitting
